title: cyclamen hederifolium subsp. crassifolium
intro: Cyclamen hederifolium subsp. crassifolium, also known as ivy-leaved hederifolium cyclamen, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the primulaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anthelmintic, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of cyclamen hederifolium subsp. crassifolium include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs and colds, and treat digestive problems. Herbal preparations of cyclamen hederifolium subsp. crassifolium can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
